Answer: a) P ( J OR K ) = P ( J ) + P ( K ) - P ( J AND K ); 0.45 = 0.18 + 0.37 - P ( J AND K ); solve to find P ( J AND K ) = 0.10 b) P (NOT ( J AND K )) = 1 - P ( J AND K ) = 1 - 0.10 = 0.90 c) P (NOT ( J OR K )) = 1 - P ( J OR K ) = 1 - 0.45 = 0.55
